options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: ultimate_lair
options.description: Include the Ultimate Lair dungeon checks for progression.

options.name: superbosses
options.description: Allow superboss related checks to be included in progression.

options.name: canvas_of_prayers
options.description: Allow Canvas of Prayers related checks to be included in progression.

options.name: grindy
options.description: Allow 20+ Soul Seeds and 10+ Unappraised items checks to be included in progression.

options.name: shuffle_teleport
options.description: Allow Teleport to be shuffled into the item pool.

options.name: shuffle_escape
options.description: Allow Escape to be shuffled into the item pool.

options.name: shuffle_chronostasis
options.description: Allow Chronostasis to be shuffled into the item pool.

options.name: shuffle_curaga
options.description: Allow Curaga to be shuffled into the item pool.

options.name: shuffle_arise
options.description: Allow Arise to be shuffled into the item pool.

options.name: shuffle_esunada
options.description: Allow Esunada to be shuffled into the item pool.

options.name: shuffle_quake
options.description: Allow Quake to be shuffled into the item pool.

options.name: shuffle_decoy
options.description: Allow Decoy to be shuffled into the item pool.

options.name: shuffle_army_of_one

options.name: allow_dlc_items

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.
